violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. The ice scoop was stored directly on top of the ice machine and not on something that can be cleaned and sanitized.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The catch trays for the pizza ovens need to be cleaned. The shelf under the auto fryer needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of plastic cups was being stored on the floor in the back storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The floor under the kitchen area and under the ice machine are no longer a cleanable surface.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
